'''Vlarnya''' was the largest [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Courkrus]]. It contained several [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]], including [[The Warren]], the [[Mynock Hole]], [[Margath's on Elshandruu Pica]], and [[The Crash (cantina)|The Crash]], and [[Casino/Legends|casinos]]. [[The Aviary (Courkrus)|The Aviary]] was a section of town. It also had a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] built to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] specifications, and an [[Ale/Legends|ale]] distillery, but the city had no major industries.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
